igbo.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aghọtara m — kọwaa n'okwu nke m
igbo.start_your_microphone_and_try_it_when_: Malite maịkrofoon gị wee nwaa ya! Mgbe ị mechara, pịa "Mezue."
igbo.mark_warm_up_as_complete: Kaa mmega olu dị ka nke emezuru
igbo.the_melody_of_your_speech_rising_pitch: Egwu okwu gị. Elu olu na-arịgo = ajụjụ, na-agbada = nkwupụta, mgbanwe = mmesi ike.
igbo.how_fast_you_are_speaking_in_words_per: Ọ dị osiiso ka ị na-ekwu okwu, na okwu kwa nkeji.
igbo.your_speaking_volume_and_steadiness_ov: Oke ụda okwu gị na nkwụsi ike ya n'oge.
igbo.good_speakers_use_pauses_aim_for_20_30: Ndị na-ekwu okwu nke ọma na-eji nkwụsịtụ! Chọọ 20-30% nke nkwụsịtụ n'okwu gị.
igbo.fluency_disfluency_tracker: Onye na-eso ụzọ nka / enweghị nka
igbo.analyzes_pause_patterns_syllable_rate_: Na-enyocha ụkpụrụ nkwụsịtụ, nkwụsi ike nke ọnụ ọgụgụ nkeji okwu, na nkwụsi ike nke oke ụda iji mepụta akara nka. Dekọọ opekata mpe sekọnd 10 nke okwu, wee pịa "Nyochaa nka."
igbo.analyze_fluency_from_current_recording: Nyochaa nka site na data ndekọ ugbu a
igbo.formant_vowel_space_lab: Ụlọ nyocha oghere ụdaume nke formant
igbo.visualizes_your_vowel_sounds_on_an_ipa: Na-egosi ụda ụdaume gị na akụkụ anọ ụdaume IPA site na iji nyocha formant (F1/F2). Kpọpụta ụdaume ma lelee ntụpọ ka ọ na-emegharị iji gosi ebe ụdaume gị dara. Ọnọdụ nsọ na-egosi mgbanwe diphthong!
igbo.green_circles_target_vowel_positions_o: Okirikiri akwụkwọ ndụ ndụ = ọnọdụ ụdaume ebumnuche. Ntụpọ oroma = ụdaume gị ugbu a. Nsọ na-acha odo odo = mgbanwe ụdaume na-adịbeghị anya.
igbo.recordings_are_automatically_saved_whe: A na-echekwa ndekọ na-akpaghị aka mgbe ị kwụsịrị maịkrofoon. Kpọghachi ha na nkọwa ụda olu emekọrịtara. A na-echekwa ndekọ 3 ikpeazụ.
igbo.no_recordings_yet_start_and_stop_the_m: Enwebeghị ndekọ. Malite ma kwụsị maịkrofoon iji chekwaa ndekọ.
igbo.select_second_recording_to_compare: Họrọ ndekọ nke abụọ iji tụnyere
igbo.choose_an_exercise_type_the_tool_will_: Họrọ ụdị mmega. Ngwa ọrụ ga-enye gị ahịrịokwu iji mega mmega na nzaghachi ụda olu ozugbo.
igbo.say_this_phrase_with_the_emotion_below: Kwuo ahịrịokwu a na mmetụta dị n'okpuru. Lelee ka elu olu gị na oke ụda si agbanwe!
igbo.say_the_phrase_with_this_feeling_notic: Kwuo ahịrịokwu ahụ na mmetụta A. Rịba ama ihe na-eme elu olu gị!
igbo.i_practiced_this_phrase_record_it: Emere m mmega ahịrịokwu a, dekọọ ya
igbo.say_the_same_words_as_a_statement_pitc: Kwuo otu okwu ahụ dị ka nkwupụta (elu olu na-agbada na njedebe) na dị ka ajụjụ (elu olu na-arịgo). Lelee ọdịiche na eserese elu olu!
igbo.the_same_sentence_means_different_thin: Otu ahịrịokwu pụtara ihe dị iche iche dabere na okwu ị na-emesi ike. Họrọ okwu n'okpuru, wee kwuo ahịrịokwu ahụ na-emesi okwu ahụ ike.
igbo.read_the_passage_below_at_the_target_s: Gụọ akụkụ dị n'okpuru na ọsọ ebumnuche. Ihe ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ ọsọ ga-egosi gị ọsọ ị na-aga!
igbo.keep_going_hold_your_volume_steady: Gaa n'ihu! Jide oke ụda gị kwụsie ike.
igbo.target_pitch_pattern_green_zone_target: Ụkpụrụ elu olu ebumnuche (mpaghara akwụkwọ ndụ = ebumnuche, oroma = elu olu gị):
igbo.start_practicing_this_intonation_patte: Malite ime mmega ụkpụrụ ụda olu a
igbo.say_the_phrase_now_try_to_match_the_gr: Kwuo ahịrịokwu ugbu a! Nwaa ka ị dabara na mpaghara akwụkwọ ndụ ebumnuche.
igbo.stop_and_score_my_attempt: Kwụsị ma nye mbọ m akara
igbo.slps_use_specific_prosody_patterns_as_: Ndị ọkachamara ọgwụgwọ okwu na-eji ụkpụrụ ụda olu akọwapụtara dị ka ebumnuche ụlọ ọgwụ. Họrọ ụkpụrụ iji hụ ọdịdị elu olu ebumnuche wee mega mmega idakọrịta ya.
igbo.multilingual_pronunciation_lab: Ụlọ nyocha ịkpọ okwu ọtụtụ asụsụ
igbo.practice_pronunciation_in_any_language: Mega mmega ịkpọ okwu n'asụsụ ọ bụla! AI ga-eme ụdị ahịrịokwu ahụ, mgbe ahụ ị na-anwa idakọrịta ụda olu ya.
igbo.or_type_any_language: Ma ọ bụ pịnye asụsụ ọ bụla:
igbo.hear_the_ai_model_speak_this_phrase: Nụrụ ụdị AI ka ọ na-ekwu ahịrịokwu a
igbo.listen_carefully_to_the_model: Gee ntị nke ọma na ụdị...
igbo.your_turn_speak_the_phrase_and_try_to_: Oge gị! Kwuo ahịrịokwu wee nwaa idakọrịta ụkpụrụ elu olu.
igbo.dashed_line_model_solid_line_your_spee: Ahịrị nkewa = ụdị, ahịrị siri ike = okwu gị. Nwaa ka ha dakọrịta!
igbo.prosody_comparison_graph_showing_model: Eserese ntụnyere ụda olu na-egosi eriri ụdị na eriri okwu gị na-agbakwunye
igbo.summary_of_your_practice_session_share: Nchịkọta oge mmega gị. Kesaa ya na onye ọkachamara ọgwụgwọ okwu gị!
igbo.share_with_slp: Kesaa na onye ọkachamara ọgwụgwọ okwu
igbo.generate_a_text_summary_of_this_sessio: Mepụta nchịkọta ederede nke oge a nke ị nwere ike ịkekọrịta na onye ọkachamara ọgwụgwọ okwu gị.
igbo.clear_all_session_data_and_start_fresh: Hichapụ data oge niile wee malite ọhụrụ
igbo.oratory_and_prosody_communication_lab: Ụlọ nyocha nkwurịta okwu okwu ọha na ụda olu
igbo.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Laghachi na ndepụta ngwa ọrụ STEM Lab
igbo.speech_prosody_visualization_for_slp_r: Ngosipụta ụda olu okwu maka mmega onye ọkachamara okwu tụrụ aro
igbo.live_visualizer_record_read_your_deliv: Ngwa nlele ozugbo — dekọọ ma gụọ nnyefe gị
igbo.real_time_pitch_trace_volume_meter_fil: Nsọ elu olu ozugbo + ihe ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ oke ụda + ihe ọgụgụ okwu mejupụta. Ndị na-ekwu okwu a zụrụ azụ na-agbanwe elu olu ~30% n'ahịrịokwu; nnyefe dị larịị na-atụfu nlebara anya nke onye na-ege ntị n'ime ~sekọnd 20.
igbo.practice_work_through_a_delivery: Mmega — rụọ ọrụ site na nnyefe
igbo.pacing_target_150_wpm_pauses_between_i: Ebumnuche ọsọ ~okwu 150/nkeji. Nkwụsịtụ n'etiti echiche (sekọnd 1-2) dị arọ ka okwu. Buru ụzọ gụọ ihe odide gị n'oke olu; ahịrịokwu ndị na-adịghị mma na-egosi onwe ha ozugbo.
igbo.multilingual_same_speech_multiple_lang: Ọtụtụ asụsụ — otu okwu, ọtụtụ asụsụ
igbo.speech_rate_varies_dramatically_by_lan: Ọsọ okwu na-adịgasị iche nke ukwuu site na asụsụ: Spanish + Japanese ~nkeji okwu 7/sekọnd; Bekee ~6; Mandarin ~5. Ọsọ ozi fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ nkwụsi ike — asụsụ ndị juru eju na-ekwu okwu nwayọọ.
igbo.pace_pitch_range_filler_word_density_p: Ọsọ, oke elu olu, njupụta okwu mejupụta, oge nkwụsịtụ — a na-enye nke ọ bụla akara megide ebumnuche nyocha kwadoro. Pịa akụkụ ọ bụla iji hụ ntụaka + ndụmọdụ nkuzi.
igbo.prosody_discover_how_delivery_shapes_m: Ụda olu — chọpụta ka nnyefe si akpụzi ihe ọ pụtara
igbo.adjust_pitch_offset_pace_and_volume_ga: Dozie mgbanwe elu olu, ọsọ, na mmụba oke ụda, wee dee ihe ị hụrụ. Enweghị akara, enweghị mkpughe — mepụta echiche nke gị maka ihe kpatara ọtụtụ okwu TED ji nọrọ nso 150 okwu/nkeji.
igbo.suited_to_emphasis_reflection_gravitas: Dabara maka mmesi ike, ntụgharị uche, ịdị arọ.
igbo.default_for_most_speaking_natural_rhyt: Ndabara maka ọtụtụ okwu. Ụkwụ egwu eke.
igbo.conveys_excitement_urgency_energy: Na-ebunye obi ụtọ, ọsọ ọsọ, ike.
igbo.too_fast_comprehension_drops: Ngwa ngwa nke ukwuu — nghọta na-agbada.
igbo.adjust_pitch_offset_pacing_volume_disc: Dozie mgbanwe elu olu, ọsọ, oke ụda. Nkewa dị iche nke tempo 4. Enweghị akara, enweghị mkpughe.
igbo.hypothesis_how_does_pace_affect_audien: Echiche: Kedu ka ọsọ si emetụta nghọta ndị na-ege ntị?
igbo.most_ted_talks_are_150_wpm_investigate: Ọtụtụ okwu TED bụ ~okwu 150/nkeji. Chọpụta ihe kpatara ya.
igbo.when_does_pitch_variation_help_vs_dist: Kedu mgbe mgbanwe elu olu na-enyere aka megide mgbe ọ na-adọpụ uche?
igbo.explain_how_prosody_shapes_oratory_imp: Kọwaa ka ụda olu si akpụzi mmetụta okwu ọha.
igbo.design_note_discrete_4_tempo_marker_no: Ndetu imewe: akara tempo 4 dị iche; enweghị akara nnyefe; enweghị mkpughe — na-akpachara anya.
igbo.this_tool_is_designed_as_a_tier_1_clas: Emebere ngwa ọrụ a dị ka ntinye ọrụ klaasị nke Ọkwa 1. Maka ọgwụgwọ okwu nke onye ọ bụla, biko gakwuru onye ọkachamara ọgwụgwọ okwu akwadoro.
igbo.visualizations_use_web_audio_api_pitch: Ngosipụta na-eji nchọpụta elu olu nke Web Audio API (mmekọrịta onwe) na nyocha oke. A na-eme nhazi niile n'ime ihe nchọgharị — enweghị ọdịyo a na-edekọ ma ọ bụ zipu.
